TraitDef.description: This pawn is naturally resistant to the sickness spread by diseased zombies and their blood.

li.label: zombie-plague immune
li.description: This pawn cannot catch the sickness spread by sick zombies or their blood.

TraitDef.description: This pawn instinctively goes for the head in combat and tries to put enemies down with precise cranial strikes.

li.label: head hunter
li.description: This pawn always aims for the head in combat when the target has one.

TraitDef.description: This pawn carries a corpse-like scent and presence that leaves zombies strangely uninterested.

li.label: dead scent
li.description: Zombies do not treat this pawn as hostile and usually ignore them unless caught in collateral damage.
